'''latutu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dyet|dyet]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-t-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dyet|dyet]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| latutu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lætitith|lætitith]] || [[word:lætitij|lætitij]] || [[word:lætitish|lætitish]] || [[word:lætiti|lætiti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:latutututh|latutututh]] || [[word:latututuj|latututuj]] || [[word:latututush|latututush]] || [[word:latututu|latututu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:latututh|latututh]] || [[word:latutuj|latutuj]] || [[word:latutush|latutush]] || [[word:latutu|latutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:latuftuth|latuftuth]] || [[word:latuftuj|latuftuj]] || [[word:latuftush|latuftush]] || [[word:latuftuf|latuftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:latututhu|latututhu]] || [[word:latutuju|latutuju]] || [[word:latutushu|latutushu]] || [[word:latutuku|latutuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:latututh|latututh]] || [[word:latutuj|latutuj]] || [[word:latutush|latutush]] || [[word:latutu|latutu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:latututhul|latututhul]] || [[word:latutujul|latutujul]] || [[word:latutushul|latutushul]] || [[word:latutukul|latutukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:latututhuthu|latututhuthu]] || [[word:latutujuju|latutujuju]] || [[word:latutushushu|latutushushu]] || [[word:latutuku|latutuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:latututhun|latututhun]] || [[word:latutujun|latutujun]] || [[word:latutushun|latutushun]] || [[word:latutukun|latutukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:latututhuoro|latututhuoro]] || [[word:latutujuoro|latutujuoro]] || [[word:latutushuoro|latutushuoro]] || [[word:latutukuoro|latutukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
